author: lena.fischer
message: refactor: structured logging fields in request middleware
diff:
@@ internal/middleware/log.go @@
-		log.Printf("%s %s", r.Method, r.URL.Path)
+		logger.Info("request",
+			"method", r.Method,
+			"path", r.URL.Path,
+			"trace_id", traceID(r.Context()))

author: priya.nair
message: ci: cache go build in GitHub Actions
diff:
@@ .github/workflows/build.yml @@
+      - uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.cache/go-build
+          key: go-build-${{ hashFiles('go.sum') }}

author: jdoe
diff:
@@ pkg/cache/registry.go @@
-	registry = newRegistry()
+	registryOnce.Do(func() {
+		registry = newRegistry()
+	})

author: ivan.petrov
message: feat: add prometheus histogram for cache hits
diff:
@@ pkg/cache/metrics.go @@
+	cacheHitLatency = prometheus.NewHistogram(prometheus.HistogramOpts{
+		Name:    "cache_hit_latency_seconds",
+		Buckets: prometheus.DefBuckets,
+	})
+	prometheus.MustRegister(cacheHitLatency)

author: grace.kim
diff:
@@ internal/httputil/writer.go @@
-	w.WriteHeader(code)
-	json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(body)
+	WriteJSON(w, code, body)
+}
+
+func WriteJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, code int, body any) {
+	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
+	w.WriteHeader(code)
+	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(body)
